title: L'art de méditer
author: L'art de méditer
description: Dans L'art de méditer, toutes les publicités sont placées au début de chaque épisode, pour que rien ne vienne interrompre ce moment que vous vous offrez. Ce choix simple soutient le podcast et protège ce silence fragile où tout peut enfin se déposer. Vous savez, ce moment du soir où vous éteignez la lumière, où la maison devient calme mais où l’esprit, lui, commence à parler plus fort. C’est souvent là que méditations et méditation du soir deviennent plus qu’un mot. C’est là que la méditation cesse d’être une idée et devient un refuge. Dans L'art de méditer, chaque méditation pour dormir est pensée pour ceux qui connaissent ces nuits où le cœur pense trop. Chaque méditation pleine conscience est une main tendue vers ce présent que l’on fuit sans le vouloir.  Peut-être que vous avez déjà essayé une méditation guidee, cherchant une voix pour vous accompagner. Peut-être que la musique méditation vous a déjà enveloppé comme une couverture invisible. Dans L'art de méditer, la méditation guidée devient une expérience intime. Même si vous avez écouté la méditation christophe andré ou découvert la meditation pleine conscience ailleurs, ici, dans L'art de méditer, quelque chose de plus personnel se crée. La méditation guidée que vous trouvez ici n’est pas une performance, c’est une conversation intérieure.  Il y a des jours où les méditations ressemblent à des tentatives hésitantes. Des soirs où la méditation du soir devient urgente, presque vitale. Vous vous allongez, vous lancez une méditation pour dormir, et vous espérez que la méditation pleine conscience viendra calmer cette tension dans la poitrine. Vous cherchez une méditation guidee qui comprend votre fatigue. Vous laissez la musique méditation remplir la pièce. Dans L'art de méditer, chaque méditation guidée est conçue pour ces instants précis, ceux où vous vous reconnaissez dans le silence.  Peut-être que vous vous dites que la méditation devrait être facile. Pourtant, les méditations révèlent souvent nos contradictions. Vous voulez lâcher prise, mais vous vous accrochez. Vous lancez une méditation du soir, mais vos pensées récitent la journée. Vous espérez qu’une méditation pour dormir efface tout, alors que la méditation pleine conscience vous invite à regarder en face. Dans L'art de méditer, la méditation guidee ne vous demande pas d’être parfait. La musique méditation devient un pont. La méditation guidée devient un espace sûr.  Et puis il y a ces matins où les méditations ouvrent la fenêtre intérieure. Même après une méditation du soir agitée, une nouvelle méditation peut naître. Vous découvrez qu’une méditation pour dormir prépare aussi le réveil. La méditation pleine conscience vous apprend à respirer dans le métro, au travail, dans l’attente. Dans L'art de méditer, chaque méditation guidee est une invitation à revenir. La musique méditation vous accompagne comme un battement discret. La méditation guidée vous rappelle que vous n’êtes pas seul.  Vous avez peut-être cherché la méditation christophe andré, ou testé la meditation pleine conscience en ligne, mais dans L'art de méditer, les méditations deviennent votre histoire. La méditation du soir devient un rituel. La méditation devient un langage. Chaque méditation pour dormir vous aide à déposer ce que vous portez. La méditation pleine conscience vous apprend à reconnaître vos émotions sans les fuir. La méditation guidee vous offre une voix stable. La musique méditation crée un espace où votre souffle retrouve son rythme. La méditation guidée vous guide vers vous-même.  À force d’écouter L'art de méditer, quelque chose change doucement. Les méditations ne sont plus un outil extérieur, elles deviennent un réflexe intérieur. La méditation du soir devient un rendez-vous avec votre vérité. La méditation cesse d’être un effort. Chaque méditation pour dormir devient une transition douce. La méditation pleine conscience éclaire vos réactions. La méditation guidee vous aide à comprendre ce qui vous traverse. La musique méditation berce vos résistances. La méditation guidée transforme votre solitude en présence.  Dans L'art de méditer, vous ne venez pas chercher une solution magique. Vous venez vous reconnaître. Les méditations deviennent des miroirs. La méditation du soir devient une respiration partagée. La méditation devient un acte d’amour envers vous-même. Chaque méditation pour dormir devient un pas vers la paix. La méditation pleine conscience devient une manière de vivre. La méditation guidee devient un fil rouge. La musique méditation devient une atmosphère intérieure. La méditation guidée devient votre maison.  Et lorsque vous appuyez sur lecture dans L'art de méditer, vous ne faites pas que lancer un épisode. Vous choisissez de vous écouter. Vous choisissez de ralentir. Vous choisissez de vivre vos méditations, d’honorer votre méditation du soir, de redécouvrir la méditation, d’accueillir chaque méditation pour dormir, d’explorer la méditation pleine conscience, de suivre une méditation guidee, de vous laisser porter par la musique méditation, et de revenir encore et encore vers la méditation guidée. Dans L'art de méditer, vous ne vous perdez pas. Vous vous retrouvez.

description: The April Effect: More From Rest — God’s Divine Design  Podcast description  Supernatural stories from every side of the equation — from a girl who’s LIVED on every side. The journey of a skeptic rebel turned truth-teller.  Starting out with only question, a need for truth, and a bigger need for some help. Here's the songs they inspired, the stories behind them, and what happens when you stop believing what you’re told and “mess around and find out” the hard way.  I've been through hell and back - on repeat — so you don’t have to! I am not gushy girl, but my heart is so full because of YOU — yes, YOU— reading this. If you only knew how much I’ve begged, screamed, cried — wept on my FACE — for you — for DECADES!  To somehow make it here now.  YOU kept me going.  — You are HOME here.  — You are LOVED here.   And when I pray… I give thanks and fight for you in the Spirit… YOU will fulfill EVERY one of your days enjoying YOUR fairytale — whatever that is for you — and start it right NOW. 🙌  Because MY fairytale is YOU getting YOURS! …  & I’m GETTIN’ mine, y’all!   — April 👊

description:
The Business of Audio Podcast is where audio engineers, producers, and studio owners learn how to build a real career in audio.

Hosted by Grammy-winning studio owner Donny Baker, this show covers recording, mixing, studio ownership, getting clients, business systems, marketing, and the realities of making a living in the audio industry.

Drawing from more than 40 years of experience in recording studios, live sound, music production, and business ownership, each episode delivers practical advice, real-world stories, and honest conversations about what it takes to turn audio skills into consistent income.

Whether you're just getting started or looking to grow your existing business, you'll find actionable insights designed to help you improve your craft, attract more clients, and build a career that lasts.

No fluff. No theory. Just real talk for audio pros.

Learn to make your living making music happen.

title: Don't Question Genius
author: Ruben
description:
Don't Question Genius is a podcast built around the idea that some of life's best stories begin with a crazy idea, an unexpected moment, or a decision that nobody else understood.

Inspired by a phrase coined by a friend—"Don't Question Genius"—this podcast dives into real conversations about life, friendships, work, relationships, success, failure, pop culture, sports, and the random moments that somehow turn into unforgettable stories.

Hosted with humor, honesty, and curiosity, each episode explores the experiences, lessons, and personalities that shape our lives. From hilarious workplace stories and friendship drama to inspiring journeys and unexpected twists, no topic is off limits.

Whether you're looking for laughs, life lessons, thought-provoking conversations, or just something entertaining to listen to during your commute, Don't Question Genius delivers authentic stories and perspectives that remind us that sometimes the most unbelievable ideas end up making the most sense.

New episodes weekly.

Because the best stories often start when someone says, "Trust me."

And sometimes...

Don't Question Genius.

Netnaija Movie Talk is created for listeners who enjoy quality entertainment and want to stay connected with the latest developments in the world of movies, television, and online streaming. Whether you're a fan of action-packed blockbusters, emotional dramas, thrilling crime stories, fantasy adventures, family-friendly animations, documentaries, or trending series, you'll find content tailored to your interests.

The number one Sunday Times and Audible best seller from 'the most influential public intellectual in the Western world right now' (New York Times) - read by the man himself.

How should we live properly in a world of chaos and uncertainty?

Jordan Peterson has helped millions of people, young and old, men and women, aim at a life of responsibility and meaning. Now he can help you.

Drawing on his own work as a clinical psychologist and on lessons from humanity's oldest myths and stories, Peterson offers 12 profound and realistic principles to live by. After all, as he reminds us, we each have a vital role to play in the unfolding destiny of the world.

Deep, rewarding and enlightening, 12 Rules for Life is a lifeboat built solidly for stormy seas: ancient wisdom applied to our contemporary problems.

title: Los derechos en juego

description:

El tono es reflexivo con la apuesta de visualizar que la fiesta no está peleada con las contradicciones y coexistien.

Cada episodio parte de una sede del torneo y desde ahí construye un puente hacia un tema de derechos humanos: desigualdad, migración, protesta, desaparición forzada y memoria histórica, además de un panorama general que abre la serie.

title: The Power of Discipline by Daniel Walter, Book Summary, Podcast, English
author: Raghvendra Singh
description:
Buy the book on Amazon : https://amzn.to/3I39vxw

Have you spent weeks, months, or even years trying to achieve your goals but keep failing?

Have you given up on becoming successful because your futile efforts have led you to believe that success is only for the select few?

If you have answered “yes” to any of these questions—don’t worry, there is still hope for you!

Before you can achieve anything in life, you need a solid foundation of self-discipline. Talent, intelligence, and skill are only a part of the equation. Positive thinking, affirmations, and vision boards are only a part of the equation. If you want to turn your dreams into reality, you need self-discipline.

Self-discipline is what will keep you focused when all hell is breaking loose and it looks like you are one step away from failure. It will give you the mental toughness required to dismantle the limitations you have placed on yourself and break through all obstacles standing in the way of your goals.

How would you feel if I told you that your inability to achieve your goals does not arise because you are lazy or lack drive, but rather it’s a problem because you have never been taught how to practice self-discipline?

title: Untangled: ADHD, Trauma, & Mental Health
author: Dr. Priti Kothari
description: Mental health can feel overwhelming, confusing, and isolating — but it doesn’t have to. Welcome to Untangled — ADHD, Trauma & Mental Health, hosted by Dr. Priti Kothari, a psychiatrist based in Florida specializing in child, adolescent, and adult psychiatry.Every week, Dr. Kothari breaks down the topics that matter most — from ADHD and neurodivergent experiences to trauma, healing, and everyday mental wellness. Whether you’re navigating your own journey, raising a neurodivergent child, or supporting someone you love, this podcast is your space to learn, reflect, and feel less alone.Expect honest conversations, expert insights, and a stigma-free zone where complex topics are made simple.🎧 Available on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and other major platforms — in both video and audio formats. New episodes every week.

title: The Power of Now by Eckhart Tolle, Book Summary, Podcast, English
author: Raghvendra Singh
description:
Celebrating 25 Years as a New York Times Bestseller — Over 16 Million Copies Sold

Checkout the book on Amazon : https://amzn.to/3UQfusn

It’s no wonder that The Power of Now has sold over 16 million copies worldwide and has been translated into over 30 foreign languages. Much more than simple principles and platitudes, the book takes readers on an inspiring spiritual journey to find their true and deepest self and reach the ultimate in personal growth and spirituality: the discovery of truth and light. In the first chapter, Tolle introduces listeners to enlightenment and its natural enemy, the mind. He awakens readers to their role as a creator of pain and shows them how to have a pain-free identity by living fully in the present. The journey is thrilling, and along the way, the author shows how to connect to the indestructible essence of our Being, “the eternal, ever-present One Life beyond the myriad forms of life that are subject to birth and death.” Featuring a new preface by the author, this paperback shows that only after regaining awareness of Being, liberated from Mind and intensely in the Now, is there Enlightenment.

title: Bound and Brewed
author: Mariah, Amanda and Ariana
description: Grab a cup and settle in with Bound & Brewed — a podcast hosted by three sisters who love coffee almost as much as books. Pulitzer Prize–winning, #1 New York Times bestselling author Elizabeth Strout’s new novel tells the story of a chance incident that sparks a powerful realization in a beloved teacher’s life—a poignant meditation on loneliness, friendship, parenthood, and the importance of truth in a capsizing world Artie Dam is living a double life. He spends his days teaching history to eleventh graders, expanding their young minds, correcting their casual cruelties, and lending a kind word to those who need it most. He goes to holiday parties with his wife of three decades, makes small talk with neighbors, and, on weekends, takes his sailboat out on the beautiful Massachusetts Bay. He is, by all appearances, present and alive. But inside, Artie is plagued by feelings of isolation. He looks out at a world gone mad—at himself and the people around him—and turns a question over and over in his mind: How is it that we know so little about one another, even those closest to us?

title: Beneath the Surface
author: LRWRA
description:
Real people. Real projects. Real progress.


The Little Rock Water Reclamation Authority manages the sewer infrastructure that protects public health and the environment for the people of Little Rock. Most of that work happens out of sight. Beneath the Surface brings it into view.


Hosted by LRWRA CEO Jean Block, each episode features the staff, partners, and community members who keep our city's water infrastructure running — from the field crews and specialists who do the daily work, to the haulers, contractors, and businesses who help us protect the shared sewer system we all depend on.


Expect honest conversations about the realities of sewer work: the challenges, the partnerships, the ongoing projects, and the people behind it all. Whether you're a Little Rock resident, a water industry professional, or just curious about the infrastructure that makes modern life possible, you'll find something here.


New episodes quarterly. Learn more at LRWRA.com/podcast/

Dans la catégorie des loisirs et de l'art de vivre, cultiver de belles amitiés et prendre le temps de s'asseoir pour discuter est sans doute le passe-temps le plus précieux. Animé par Saskia Thuot, figure incontournable du lifestyle et de la décoration au Québec, ce balado vous invite directement chez elle, sur sa propre terrasse, pour des rencontres intimistes loin des studios traditionnels.

Installez-vous confortablement, prenez une petite bouchée ou un verre, et joignez-vous à Saskia pour des conversations authentiques et sans filtre avec des personnalités chères au public (Marie-Claude Barrette, Kim Rusk, Sébastien Diaz, et l'équipe de Décore ta vie). Et au Saskia Club, tout peut arriver. Une grande réflexion, une confidence touchante ou un fou rire complètement inattendu. Parfois les trois en même temps ! Le Saskia Club vous offre un accès privilégié à des confidences et des moments de grande complicité.

Au Saskia Club, vous retrouverez :

  • L'art de recevoir : Une ambiance chaleureuse et réconfortante qui donne l'impression d'être invité dans la cour de Saskia.
  • De l'authenticité sans filtre : Des discussions à cœur ouvert où tout peut arriver.
  • Un moment pour soi : La pause parfaite dans votre semaine pour déconnecter, sourire et vous laisser inspirer par des histoires humaines captivantes.

description: Ready to finally calm the overwhelm and create a home and life you actually enjoy? The Wannabe Clutter Free podcast is here to help you clear the clutter, simplify your routines, and find freedom in the life you’re building. I’m Deanna Yates, a busy mom who knows what it’s like to juggle family, career, and the never-ending piles of stuff. From selling 80% of what we owned to travel with our toddler, to managing the daily chaos of running a home with a school-aged kid, I’ve learned that living with less isn’t about deprivation. It’s about creating more space, more peace, and more joy. Each week, I share real-life stories, simple decluttering strategies, and mindset shifts that make it easier to let go of what’s weighing you down. You’ll also hear from inspiring guests who share practical tips and fresh perspectives on minimalism, home organization, intentional living, and building habits that last. If you’re tired of feeling buried in clutter and crave a home that feels calm, welcoming, and easy to manage, this show is for you. It’s not about perfection. It’s about progress, freedom, and finding space for what truly matters to you.

description: این «رادیو فهم»ه.و راستش بخوام خیلی ساده بگم، اینجا قرار نیست اتفاق عجیب و خاصی بیفته دغدغه‌ها و سؤال‌های مختلف زندگی کردم. خیلی وقت‌ها دنبال جواب بودم؛ برای تصمیم‌هایی که باید می‌گرفتم، برای حس‌هایی که نمی‌فهمیدم از کجا میان، و برای روزهایی که انگار یه چیزی سر جاش نبود.قرار نیست اینجا نسخه‌ای برای زندگی بپیچیم یا جواب همه سؤال‌ها رو پیدا کنیم، چون راستش خود من هم هنوز در حال یاد گرفتنم.شاید فقط هر بار کنار هم بشینیم و درباره چیزهایی حرف بزنیم که همه‌مون یه جورایی تجربه‌شون کردیم؛ نگرانی‌هایی مثل آینده‌ای که معلوم نیست چی توش منتظر ماست، تردیدهایی که موقع تصمیم گرفتن سراغمون میان، اشتباه‌هایی که بعداً بارها توی ذهنمون مرورشون می‌کنیم و سؤال‌هایی که بعضی شب‌ها قبل از خواب رها‌مون نمی‌کنن.درباره انتخاب‌هامون، ترس‌هامون، اشتباه‌هامون، و سؤال‌هایی که گاهی بی‌جواب می‌مونن.و شاید توی همین گفتگوهای ساده، همدیگه رو بهتر بفهمیم و کم‌کم چیزهایی رو ببینیم که قبلاً از کنارشان رد شده بودیم.قراره فقط با هم حرف بزنیم... درباره زندگی.

NEW YORK TIMES BESTSELLER — A Trusted Plan for Becoming Debt-Free with Over 8 Million Copies Sold.

Do you want to build a budget that actually works for you? Are you ready to transform your relationship with money? This New York Times bestseller has already helped millions of people just like you learn how to develop everyday money-saving habits with the help of America's favorite personal finance expert, Dave Ramsey.

By now, you've already heard all of the nutty get-rich-quick schemes and the fiscal diet fads that leave you with a lot of quirky ideas but not a penny in your pocket. If you're tired of the lies and sick of the false promises, Dave is here to provide practical, long-term help. The Total Money Makeover is the simplest, most straightforward game plan for completely changing your finances. And, best of all, these principles are based on results, not pie-in-the-sky fantasies. This is the financial reset you've been looking for.

The Total Money Makeover will give you the tools and the encouragement you need to:

  • Design a sure-fire plan for paying off all debt--from your cars to your home and everything in between using the debt snowball method
  • Break bad habits and make lasting changes when it comes to your relationship with money
  • Recognize the 10 most dangerous money myths
  • Set aside enough money to pay for unexpected expenses and emergencies
  • Save enough money for your retirement
  • Live like no one else, so later you can LIVE (and GIVE) like no one else!

This new edition of The Total Money Makeover includes new content that will help you tackle marriage conflict, college debt, and so much more.

title: The Untethered Soul: The Journey Beyond Yourself by Michael A. Singer, Book Summary, Podcast
author: Raghvendra Singh
description:
#1 New York Times bestseller

Buy the book on Amazon : https://amzn.to/4p2pWuz

What would it be like to free yourself from limitations and soar beyond your boundaries? What can you do each day to discover inner peace and serenity? The Untethered Soul offers simple yet profound answers to these questions.

Whether this is your first exploration of inner space, or you’ve devoted your life to the inward journey, this book will transform your relationship with yourself and the world around you. You’ll discover what you can do to put an end to the habitual thoughts and emotions that limit your consciousness. By tapping into traditions of meditation and mindfulness, author and spiritual teacher Michael A. Singer shows how the development of consciousness can enable us all to dwell in the present moment and let go of painful thoughts and memories that keep us from achieving happiness and self-realization.

Copublished with the Institute of Noetic Sciences (IONS) The Untethered Soul begins by walking you through your relationship with your thoughts and emotions, helping you uncover the source and fluctuations of your inner energy. It then delves into what you can do to free yourself from the habitual thoughts, emotions, and energy patterns that limit your consciousness. Finally, with perfect clarity, this book opens the door to a life lived in the freedom of your innermost being.

The Untethered Soul has already touched the lives of more than a million readers, and is available in a special hardcover gift edition with ribbon bookmark—the perfect gift for yourself, a loved one, or anyone who wants a keepsake edition of this remarkable book.

In the decades since the initial publication of The Way of the Superior Man, society has changed significantly. Issues of gender and sexuality long confined to secrecy have become part of everyday conversation, and rigid ideas about our societal roles have begun to dissolve.

And yet, perhaps now more than at any time, men of all ages still “tussle with the challenges of women, work, and sexual desire.” In this unabridged audiobook of the classic guide to masculine spirituality, David Deida encourages men and women to lean into the conversation and offer their most valuable assets to the world—their authentic heart and depth of presence.

More relevant than ever, The Way of the Superior Man offers a view of a more conscious and embodied masculinity. “It is time to evolve beyond the macho jerk ideal, all spine and no heart”, writes Deida. “It is also time to evolve beyond the sensitive and caring wimp ideal, all heart and no spine.”

title: The Plenterra Perspective
author: Plenterra
description:
Welcome to The Plenterra Perspective — a podcast dedicated to one simple truth:

It all starts and ends with the soil.

Hosted by Dan Lockwood, Founder & CEO of Plenterra, this podcast explores the science, economics, policy, and practical implementation of regenerative agriculture. Through conversations with growers, agronomists, scientists, policymakers, and industry leaders, we examine how healthy soils create healthier farms, healthier food systems, healthier communities, and a more resilient future.

From soil biology and nutrient cycling to biochar, carbon management, water conservation, farm profitability, and emerging technologies, The Plenterra Perspective is focused on helping producers understand not just why soil health matters—but how to implement it successfully and profitably.

Whether you're a farmer, rancher, agronomist, land manager, policymaker, or simply someone passionate about the future of agriculture, this podcast is designed to provide practical insights, real-world solutions, and thought-provoking conversations.

What You'll Learn

🌱 Soil Health & Regenerative Agriculture

🌱 Soil Biology & Microbial Systems

🌱 Biochar & Carbon Management

🌱 Water Infiltration & Drought Resilience

🌱 Farm Profitability & Risk Management

🌱 Nutrient Cycling & Fertility

🌱 NRCS, EQIP & Conservation Programs

🌱 Precision Agriculture & Emerging Technologies

🌱 The Future of Food Production

The Plenterra Philosophy

"We're trying to get Mother Nature back on the payroll."

"Regenerative agriculture isn't about farming like it's 1850. It's about farming like it's 2050."

"Carbon has become a political football. Plants don't care. They still need it."

"We spent 70 years treating soil like dirt, then wondered why it started acting like it."

At Plenterra, we believe the future of agriculture lies in combining the best science, the best technology, and the best understanding of natural systems to create more profitable, resilient, and productive operations.

Subscribe and join the conversation as we explore the ideas, innovations, and opportunities shaping the future of agriculture.

Because it all starts and ends with the soil.

🌱 Learn More: https://plenterra.com

For Those Tired of Sweet Lies, Here Is the Truth: Unfiltered. Undiluted. Unafraid.

In a world where vagueness is mistaken for depth and obscurity passes for wisdom, Truth without Apology slices through our borrowed beliefs with rare clarity and fire. This is not a book to entertain or console.

It is a challenge. A mirror. A sword.

Drawn from Acharya Prashant’s most penetrating writings, these reflections confront the reader on the deepest fronts—identity, time, desire, ego, relationships and the unseen forces that govern our mind. There are no borrowed ideals here. No recycled spirituality. Only original seeing, hammered out in the furnace of honesty and inner rigour. This is not for the seeker of comfort. It is for the one who is willing to be scorched clean. For the one who dares to ask: What is life really about, and am I living it right?

If you are done with half-truths and pop wisdom, if you are ready to meet yourself without disguise, this book will not only speak to you, it will stir something in you that cannot be silenced again.

But be warned: Truth does not flatter. It does not apologize. And once seen, it cannot be unseen.

description:
Buy the book on Amazon : https://amzn.to/4pp9ODM

#1 New York Times Bestseller · USA Today Bestseller · Globe and Mail Bestseller · Publishers Weekly Bestseller.

Lowen Ashleigh is a struggling writer on the brink of financial ruin when she accepts the job offer of a lifetime. Jeremy Crawford, husband of bestselling author Verity Crawford, has hired Lowen to complete the remaining books in a successful series his injured wife is unable to finish.

Lowen arrives at the Crawford home, ready to sort through years of Verity’s notes and outlines, hoping to find enough material to get her started. What Lowen doesn’t expect to uncover in the chaotic office is an unfinished autobiography Verity never intended for anyone to read. Page after page of bone-chilling admissions, including Verity's recollection of the night her family was forever altered.

Lowen decides to keep the manuscript hidden from Jeremy, knowing its contents could devastate the already grieving father. But as Lowen’s feelings for Jeremy begin to intensify, she recognizes all the ways she could benefit if he were to read his wife’s words. After all, no matter how devoted Jeremy is to his injured wife, a truth this horrifying would make it impossible for him to continue loving her.

title: St. John Chrysostom (c. 349 - c. 407) - Homilies on Ephesians
author: Michela Bertazzo
description:
From The Argument:
“Ephesus is the metropolis of Asia. It was dedicated to Diana, whom especially they worshipped there as their great goddess. Indeed so great was the superstition of her worshippers, that when her temple was burnt, they would not so much as divulge the name of the man who burnt it. The blessed John the Evangelist spent the chief part of his time there: he was there when he was banished and there he died. It was there too that Paul left Timothy, as he says in writing to him, “As I exhorted thee to tarry at Ephesus.”

“Most of the philosophers also, those more particularly who flourished in Asia, were there; and even Pythagoras himself is said to have come from thence; perhaps because Samos, whence he really came, is an island of Ionia. It was the resort also of the disciples of Parmenides, and Zeno, and Democritus, and you may see a number of philosophers there even to the present day.

“These facts I mention, not merely as such, but with a view of showing that Paul would needs take great pains and trouble in writing to these Ephesians. He is said indeed to have entrusted them, as being persons already well-instructed, with his profoundest conceptions; and the Epistle itself is full of sublime thoughts and doctrines.

“He wrote the Epistle from Rome, and, as he himself informs us, in bonds. “Pray for me, that utterance may be given unto me, in opening my mouth to make known with boldness the mystery of the Gospel, for which I am an ambassador in chains.” It abounds with sentiments of overwhelming loftiness and grandeur. Thoughts which he scarcely so much as utters any where else, he here plainly declares; as when he says, “To the intent that now unto the principalities and the powers in the heavenly places might be made known through the Church the manifold wisdom of God.” And again; “He raised us up with him, and made us to sit with him in heavenly places.” And again; “Which in other generations was not made known unto the sons of men, as it hath now been revealed unto His holy apostles and prophets in the Spirit, that the Gentiles are fellow-heirs, and fellow-partakers of the promise in Christ.”” (St John Chrysostom)

title: José de Alencar (1829 - 1877) - Senhora
author: Michela Bertazzo
description:
Senhora é um dos mais importantes clássicos da literatura brasileira, e o terceiro livro do mesmo autor que analisa a situação da mulher na sociedade brasileira do século XIX. Através da história de amor e separação entre Aurélia e Fernando, o autor critica a decadência da elite cortesã, a importância dada ao dinheiro e os casamentos por interesse. O romance, dividido em quatro partes, reflete este objetivo em sua própria estrutura, em que imita uma transação comercial: preço, quitação, posse, resgate.

"Senhora" is one of the most important classics of Brazilian Literature, and the third book by this author about the situation of women in the 19th century Brazilian society. Through a story of love and separation between the two main characters, Aurélia and Fernando, the author criticizes the decadence of the court society, the importance given to possessions and the marriages for money. The novel, divided in four parts, satirizes these relationships in its own structure, by having its parts called: price, purchase, possession, solvency. (Summary by Leni)

title: José de Alencar - Cinco Minutos
author: Michela Bertazzo
description:
Cinco minutos é o primeiro romance do escritor brasileiro José de Alencar, nome proeminente do romantismo no país. Foi publicada em 1856 em forma de folhetins pelo jornal Diário do Rio de Janeiro. Ao final de alguns meses, com todos os capítulos já publicados, esses foram juntados em uma única edição que foi oferecida como brinde para os assinantes do jornal. No entanto, diversas pessoas que não assinavam o jornal, procuraram um volume do livro.

A obra é escrita na forma de carta a uma prima do autor, D..., relatando seu amor por uma jovem, Carlota, nome o qual só é revelado nos últimos capítulos do livro.

Inicia-se a história, no Rio de Janeiro, quando o narrador perde o ônibus por um atraso de cinco minutos e é obrigado a pegar o próximo. Senta-se ao lado de uma mulher. Apaixona-se por ela, mas não vê seu rosto e teme que a mulher seja feia; ela parte pedindo que não a esqueça, mas ele a perde. Depois de um mês tentando descobrir quem é a amada, a encontra numa ópera (La Traviata, de Giuseppe Verdi), declara-se mas ela foge deixando um lenço cheio de lágrimas.

Depois de outros desencontros, finalmente o narrador conhece a mulher e declara-se. Por carta, ela revela que já o observava nos bailes, amava-o há tempos mas não podiam ficar juntos porque ela tinha uma doença incurável.

O narrador faz de tudo para ir atrás da sua amada e enfrenta diversos contratempos.(Resumo extraído da Wikipedia)

title: La Contessa di Karolystria di Antonio Ghislanzoni.
author: AudioBooks
description:
La Contessa di Karolystria di Antonio Ghislanzoni.  
Antonio Ghislanzoni, nato a Barco di Maggianico (Lecco) il 25 novembre 1824, è meglio noto come autore di numerosissimi libretti per opere liriche tra cui "Aida" e "La forza del destino" di Giuseppe Verdi. Personalità eclettica: baritono egli stesso fino al 1856, nonché ex seminarista cacciato per cattiva condotta, stimolato dalle idee di Mazzini, nel 1848 dirige a Milano diversi giornali repubblicani; a causa delle sue idee fu anche arrestato dai francesi e brevemente detenuto in Corsica. Muore a Caprino Bergamasco il 16 luglio 1893.  
"La contessa di Karolystria" è definito dallo stesso autore "il più balzano, il più strampalato de' miei racconti", e in effetti altro non è che una storia divertente piena di colpi di scena senza pretesa di avere "messaggi" da trasmettere. La trama è presto detta: il visconte d'Aguilar -personaggio in cui potremmo scorgere lo stesso autore- si lascia coinvolgere nel turbine di avventure in cui viene trascinato per soccorrere la contessa di Karolystria e brillantemente, tra mille peripezie, riesce cavarla dai guai e ad aprirle un nuovo futuro.

title: A Look into Why Christianity Differs from Other Religions - a Podcast for Christians, Non-Christians, Atheists, and Everybody Else
author: Dennis Belkofer
description: I don't have a seminary degree pedigree. But I have, out of the trenches of life itself, experienced the living Christ. I came to Him- more accurately, He came to me- with His love, mercy, power, and grace on August 18, 1966. He found a broken 20-year-old terrified of life, and more terrified of death.  I’ve recorded this podcast to share how Jesus transformed my life that day, how He’s never left me, and what I’ve learned along the way about what separates Christianity from every other religion. And when it comes to where the “rubber meets the road,” Christianity is the opposite of the way humans think and are wired. In short: it would take “a Jesus” to invent a Jesus. And in this podcast, I take listeners on a journey through the Bible to prove it.

Pour la première fois depuis 1986, l’Irak retrouve la scène de la Coupe du monde — un retour attendu depuis des décennies, chargé d’émotion pour tout un peuple.

Pour en parler, nous recevons Kamal, témoin engagé et passionné de football, qui nous livre son regard sur ce moment historique. Entre souvenirs, espoirs et réalités politiques, il nous aide à comprendre ce que signifie vraiment ce retour pour les Irakiens, bien au-delà du terrain.

------
Thomas Bailey Aldrich was an American writer, poet, critic, and editor. He is notable for his long editorship of The Atlantic Monthly. He was also known for his semi-autobiographical book The Story of a Bad Boy, which established the "bad boy's book" subgenre in nineteenth-century American literature, and for his poetry, which included "The Unguarded Gates". ( Wikipedia)

title: The Financial Journey Podcast
author: Baggette + Co. Wealth Management
description:
Money is rarely just about money.

It is about choices. Confidence. Family. Purpose. Retirement. Business. Legacy. And, more than anything, peace of mind.


The Financial Journey Insights is the podcast from Baggette + Co Wealth Management, created to help people feel clearer, calmer and more in control of the financial decisions that shape their future.


Each episode explores a different part of The Financial Journey, from building wealth and preparing for retirement, to stepping away from a business, supporting family, planning later life, and understanding what financial freedom really means in the real world.


You will hear thoughtful conversations with the Baggette + Co team, independent financial advisers, business owners, clients and special guests. 


This is not a podcast full of financial waffle, product chat or people trying to sound clever in suits.

It is for people who want honest, useful and human conversations about money, life and the moments where the two collide.


Because good financial planning is not just about having enough.


It is about knowing what enough means for you, and feeling confident that the future you want is within reach.


The Financial Journey Insights. Discovering Your Financial Freedom.


Baggette + Co Wealth Management is a Chartered and independent financial planning firm based in Poole, supporting clients across Dorset, Hampshire and beyond.


This podcast is for general information only and does not constitute financial advice.

title: Dawn Won't Come — Fexingo Horror
author: Fexingo
description: In the deep blue hour before sunrise, when the sky refuses to lighten and the trees stand as black sentinels, Luna sits on her porch and tells of towns where dawn has forgotten to come. This anthology collects stories of perpetual night—places where the sun stalled on the horizon and never climbed, where birds stopped singing and shadows started breathing. Each episode is a self-contained tale from a different corner of a world that forgot daylight. A lighthouse keeper whose beam illuminates only his own approaching end. A child who trades her shadow for a lie. A highway where mile markers count down to something that waits at zero. These are not jump-scares; they are slow descents, the dread of an 8 AM that feels like midnight, the wrongness of a clock that ticks backward. Luna's voice is the only warmth here, a candle flame in an endless dusk. Listen as she unravels what happens when morning breaks its promise. #DawnWontCome #EternalNight #AnthologyHorror #SlowBurn #FolkHorror #TwilightZone #ApocalypticHorror #DarkFantasy #NoSunrise #PerpetualDusk #AmericanGothic #LunaNarrates #Horror #HorrorPodcast #FexingoHorror #StorytellingHorror #DarkFiction #PodcastDread Keep every episode free: buymeacoffee.com/fexingo

title: Music is the Answer
author: Rob Stephenson
description:
Music isn't background — it's a tool. The right track can shift a mood in under a minute, settle a racing mind, lift you out of a slump, reconnect you with someone you love, or carry you through grief. We all know this intuitively. Music Is the Answer is the show about doing it on purpose.

Hosted by Rob Stephenson — wellbeing practitioner, keynote speaker, working DJ, and author of Music Is the Answer: Practical Ways to Manage Stress, Sleep Better, and Live Brighter (Wiley, August 2026) — this is a series of honest, curious conversations with guests whose work or lived experience sits at the intersection of music and wellbeing. Neuroscientists, music therapists, workplace leaders, artists, and people quietly using music to navigate the hard and beautiful parts of life.

You'll hear how a senior leader at a global law firm uses noise-cancelling headphones and a sunflower lanyard to protect focus, and why she's designing intentional sound into her firm's next office. You'll hear what's actually happening in your brain when a key change makes the hairs on your neck stand up, and why surprise is the engine of musical emotion. You'll hear from people building music into how teams connect, how patients recover, and how the rest of us get through Monday morning.

The show sits alongside Rob's wider work on intentional listening — the simple, learnable practice of using music with purpose rather than letting it wash over you. Across episodes you'll pick up small, repeatable shifts you can put into your own day: how to build a focus playlist that actually focuses you, what to listen to when you need to wind down rather than wind up, how to use music to transition between modes, and why your own taste matters more than any algorithm.

If you've ever made a playlist for a long drive, a hard week, or a person you love — you already know music is the answer. This show is about getting better at the question.

New episodes drop fortnightly. Subscribe wherever you listen.

Find Rob and the book at musicistheanswer.live

title: Magyar Resuscitatiós Társaság
author: Molnár Ferenc
description:
Magyar Resuscitatiós Társaság - Podcast Csatornája

Az újraélesztés mindenki ügye.

A Magyar Resuscitatiós Társaság podcastje közérthetően és hitelesen mutatja be az újraélesztés legfontosabb kérdéseit. A laikus újraélesztéstől a legfrissebb szakmai irányelvekig. Adásainkban tapasztalt szakemberek  orvosok, mentőtisztek, oktatók osztják meg tudásukat, valós eseteiket és gyakorlati tanácsaikat.

Célunk, hogy olyan tudást és gondolkodásmódot adjunk át, amely nemcsak felismerhetővé teszi a kritikus helyzeteket, hanem bátorságot is ad a cselekvéshez.

title: De dood of de gladiolen
author: Omroep Gelderland
description: De Nijmeegse Vierdaagse van 2006 staat in het geheugen gegrift als een dramatische Vierdaagse: door de hitte overleden twee wandelaars en werden honderden mensen onwel. Voor het eerst in de geschiedenis werd de Vierdaagse afgelast. Maar twintig jaar later blijkt dat verhaal niet helemaal te kloppen. In 'De dood of de gladiolen' reconstrueert journalist Freke Remmers van Omroep Gelderland de fatale dinsdag van minuut tot minuut. Ze spreekt ooggetuigen, artsen, hulpverleners en bestuurders - en ontdekt dat de waarheid ingewikkelder is dan we ons herinneren.

title: Frag die Akustiker - der Podcast über Hörgeräte, das Hören und endlich gut verstehen
author: Frank Jester & Doreen Kühr
description: „Frag die Akustiker“ ist der Podcast für alle, die besser hören, verstehen und am Leben teilhaben möchten. Hier sprechen Experten aus dem Glücklich-hoeren-Netzwerk – mit Fachwissen, Empathie und einer großen Portion Menschlichkeit – über Hörverlust, moderne Hörgeräte und die vielen Momente, die gutes Hören so wertvoll machen. Ob im Beruf, in der Familie oder beim Genießen von Musik:  Wir beantworten Ihre Fragen, teilen persönliche Erfahrungen und zeigen, wie moderne Hörakustik heute unterstützt – verständlich, nahbar und ohne kompliziertes Fachchinesisch.  Denn schlechtes Hören betrifft nicht nur die Ohren, sondern oft auch Gespräche, Beziehungen und die Lebensqualität. Haben Sie eine Frage? Schreiben Sie uns – wir haben Antworten und Ohren!

title: Deporte al Descubierto
author: RADIO UCASAL
description: ¿El deporte es solo rendimiento, competencia y resultados? ¿O hay algo más en juego?  “Deporte al Descubierto” es un podcast que propone ir más allá de lo visible, abriendo un espacio de reflexión sobre lo que sucede dentro y fuera de la práctica deportiva. Conducido por dos psicólogos especialistas en deporte, este ciclo ofrece una mirada profesional, crítica y profundamente humana sobre el fenómeno deportivo.   A lo largo de sus episodios, se abordan temas centrales como el deseo de jugar, la construcción de la identidad deportiva,el amor,  el lugar de los otros, el descanso, la pertenencia, la trascendencia, las problemáticas actuales del deporte y el momento del retiro. Cada capítulo invita a pensar el deporte no solo como una práctica física, sino como un espacio de desarrollo subjetivo, emocional y social.   Un podcast para vivir el deporte desde otro lugar.

If you’ve ever lost yourself in relationships, silenced your voice, questioned your worth, or felt disconnected from who you truly are, this space is for you. Together, we’ll heal, evolve, and become more.

title: Pansy, Grace Livingston Hill et al. - A Sevenfold Trouble
author: Michela Bertazzo
description:
This story is an honest record of what we, who are all writers, and all very intimate friends, have seen and heard as we looked on at the lives of certain people in whom we are deeply interested. We used to talk about these people when we sat together after the day's work was done.

"They don't understand one another," said one of the ministers, "else there wouldn't be much trouble."

"I think the little girl means better than she is supposed to," said Grace.

"And I know the two boys are not half so mean as they are made out to be," declared Paranete.

"They are like a great many people in this world," interposed the other minister, "working at cross purposes; making failures of their lives, just because they do not try to put themselves in one another's places."

"Making failures, also, because they are trying to carry their own burdens without the help of the only real Helper," said one of the ladies.

"O, yes! of course," spoke out both ministers; "that is really the foundation source of their troubles, as of most others."

Said Faye Huntington: "Let's write a book about them! One that will help others, as well as them. We can tell their story, but tell it in such a way that they won't even recognize themselves; they will only know that it fits, somehow, and helps." (Summary taken from the preface)

description: Minganie: mémoire d'un territoire est une série de balados qui vous fait découvrir les villages, les traditions, les personnages et les anecdotes qui ont façonné l'histoire de la Minganie. À travers des témoignages recueillis aux quatre coins du territoire, cette série met en valeur la mémoire collective d'une région riche de son patrimoine, de sa culture et de ses communautés. Une invitation à écouter la Minganie racontée par ceux qui la vivent et la portent encore aujourd'hui.

title: RETAIL SPORT
author: SPORT-GUIDE
description:
Sport-Guide, c’est le média professionnel de référence du commerce du sport. Un média qui décrypte depuis plus de 25 ans les évolutions d’un secteur en mouvement permanent.

Premier site internet quotidien d’information économique du sport dès 1999, Sport-Guide a toujours fait le choix de l’analyse, du terrain et de la compréhension fine des enjeux du commerce sport.

Avec Retail Sport, nous prolongeons cette démarche dans un nouveau format. Nous vous emmenons dans les coulisses des enseignes et des marques, à la rencontre de dirigeantes, dirigeants et personnalités inspirantes qui façonnent le commerce sport au quotidien.

Ici, on parle bien sûr business avec nos invités, mais pas seulement. On s'intéresse également aux trajectoires de carrière, décisions stratégiques mais aussi plus globalement au parcours de ces femmes et hommes qui ont mené ces projets. 

Retail Sport, c’est aussi un espace d’analyse. Certains épisodes, réservés aux abonnés de Sport-Guide, sont entièrement consacrés au décryptage d’un marché du sport en pleine mutation, pour apporter des clés de lecture utiles et concrètes aux professionnels du secteur.

Que vous soyez commerçant, dirigeant, distributeur, marque, manager ou acteur de l’écosystème, Retail Sport a été imaginé comme un nouvel outil  d’écoute, de réflexion et d’inspiration.

Pour aller plus loin et découvrir les épisodes de décryptage exclusifs, retrouvez-nous sur Sport-Guide.com.

Pour toute demande de partenariat : info@sport-guide.com

Sei personaggi in cerca d'autore di Luigi Pirandello.

Quest'opera teatrale fu rappresentata per la prima volta il 9 maggio 1921 al teatro Valle di Roma (dunque nel 2021 ricorre il centesimo anniversario), ma in quell'occasione ebbe un esito tempestoso, perché molti spettatori contestarono la rappresentazione, sorpresi dalla novità della stessa che rappresenta il teatro nel teatro e uno dei primi esempi di teatro dell’assurdo. Successivamente l’opera ebbe il meritato successo.  
L'opera non è divisa in atti, per espressa indicazione dell'autore, ma l'azione è interrotta comunque in due punti che creano una naturale divisione dell'opera in tre parti.

title: Edith Hubback Brown and John Hubbac - Jane Austen's Sailor Brothers
author: Michela Bertazzo
description:
"Jane Austen's Sailor Brothers" by Edith & John Hubback is a biography that explores the lives of Jane Austen's two sailor brothers, Francis and Charles. The book examines their naval careers, their relationships with their famous sister, and their impact on her writing.
They begin with background information on the Austen family and the naval world of the late eighteenth and early nineteenth centuries. They then describe Francis's and Charles's experiences in the Royal Navy, including their participation in the Napoleonic Wars and voyages to exotic locations such as the West Indies and Australia.
The Hubbacks, themselves descendents of the Austin family (Jane Austen was Edith Hubback's great-great aunt) also examine the relationship between Austen and her sailor brothers, highlighting the influence they had on her writing. For example, they discuss the naval themes that appear in Austen's novels such as "Persuasion" and "Mansfield Park" and suggest that her brothers' experiences informed these works.
Throughout the book, the Hubbacks use letters, journals, and other primary sources to bring the Austen brothers to life. They also provide context on the wider social and political issues of the time, including the impact of the wars on naval life and the attitudes towards sailors and their families.
"Jane Austen's Sailor Brothers" offers a fascinating glimpse into the lives of two important figures in Jane Austen's world and sheds light on the naval world that inspired her writing. (Summary by Bryn Roberts

title: Nouvelle Calédonie, l'étau colonial c'est nickel
author: Dolores Aloia
description:
Bonjour et bienvenue dans « Le sens de l’histoire », un podcast original de Dolores Aloia. Des faits rien que des faits, des points de vue nuancés, des rencontres sensibles pour comprendre les mouvements de libération d’hier et d’aujourd’hui.

Aux quatre coins du Globe, les îles, hauts lieux stratégiques, sont parfois traversées par des courants indépendantistes. Le droit des peuples à disposer d’eux-mêmes et à se libérer du colonialisme est une aspiration profondément ancrée qui finit toujours par se réaliser, avec le temps.

Dans cet épisode : Nouvelle Calédonie : l’étau colonial, c’est nickel, il sera question des conséquences de l’élargissement du corps électoral, des émeutes de 2024, d’une figure indépendantiste historique, Jean Marie Tjibaou, qui ouvrit la voie au dialogue et fut assassiné par ses paires, il sera aussi question de la dynamique de décolonisation à l’œuvre sur l’île depuis les années 80. 

Le processus de décolonisation de la Kanaky Nouvelle-Calédonie est-il enfin relancé ? La perspective d’élections provinciales, le 28 juin prochain, repoussées par trois fois depuis mai 2024, pourraient le faire croire. Le corps électoral a été élargi et 10 569 nouveaux électeurs vont pouvoir se prononcer et renouveler leurs représentants aux assemblées, au Congrès et au gouvernement. Dès juillet, le projet sur l'avenir de l'archipel, considéré par l'ONU comme un territoire non autonome, sera à l'agenda du gouvernement français. Un timing serré : l'échéance pour les discussions et les consultations est prévu pour fin décembre 2026.

Hébergé par Acast. Visitez acast.com/privacy pour plus d'informations.

title: Archives audio du séminaire "le travail social d'aujourd'hui"
author: Promotion des Assistants de Service Social 2eme année - IFTS Ollioules - Croix-Rouge Compétence
description:
Ce séminaire "Travail social d'aujourd'hui: crise, enjeux et mutations : regards croisés sur l’évolution des pratiques professionnelles", a été organisé par la promotion des Assistants de Service Social de 2ème année, le Mardi 19 mai 2026, à l'Institut de Formation en Travail Social de la Croix-Rouge Compétence- site d'Ollioules.

En quoi les mutations du travail social sont-elles génératrices d’adaptations et d’évolutions face aux différentes problématiques rencontrées par les professionnels ?

Programme du séminaire:

08h15 : Accueil café, exposition-animation “porteur de paroles”

09h00 : Introduction d'Antoine Bruno, directeur de l'IFTS-IFSI de la Croix-Rouge Compétence / Présentation du séminaire par les Étudiants ASS2. Ecoute d'un micro-trottoir réalisé par les étudiants.

Capsule vidéo d’ouverture “Derrière les portes du conseil conjugal”, présentée par Béatrice AUDHUY, Assistante de service social, Conseillère Conjugale et Familiale au Conseil Départemental

09h10 : Intervention de Sandrine MADONNA,

Docteur en Sociologie, Formatrice à l’IFTS : “Le

travail social à l’épreuve de la post-modernité”

09h45 : Capsule vidéo 2

“L’enfance au coeur des pratiques : ouvrir le regard à l’international”, présentée par Delphine COLLIN-VEZINA, Psychologue clinicienne, Directrice du Centre de recherche sur l’enfance et la famille (Université McGill) à Montréal au Canada, Professeure agrégée

09h55 : Pause café, exposition-animation “porteur de paroles”

10h15 : Table ronde avec la participation de :

Karine LEMEUR, Assistante de service social, Hôpital Sainte-Musse

Anissa PAYAN, Assistante de service social, Cheffe de service à l’Union Patronale du Var

Marie-Anaïs GUILMOTEAU, Educatrice de jeunes enfants libérale, formatrice

Florian TRAUQUET, Responsable Equipe mobile d’appui à la protection de l’enfance UGECAM

Caroline LANTIN, Psychologue, Hôpital San Salvadour

12h00 : Questions / Réponses

12h30 : Conclusion par les étudiants et intervention de Cristina DE ROBERTIS, Présidente de l’APEA et Membre du Comité de Rédaction de la Revue Française de Service Social de l’ANAS

13h00 : Clôture du séminaire
itunes_owner_name: Promotion des Assistants de Service Social 2eme année - IFTS Ollioules - Croix-Rouge Compétence

O serie în care vorbim despre menstruație ca subiect public și politic, care ține de drepturile omului și de egalitatea de gen.

Pe parcursul a patru episoade, alături de experți, educatori, activiști și cercetători, discutăm despre experiențele persoanelor cu menstruație și barierele sistemice în accesarea produselor, informațiilor și facilităților de bază necesare pentru gestionarea menstruației cu demnitate și în siguranță.

Mulțumiri către The Youth pentru spațiu și echipament.

Asociația Iele-Sânziene este o organizație fondată în 2019 care sprijină tinerii să își acceseze drepturile sexuale și reproductive și promovează echitatea menstruală ca politică publică în România. În ultimii 6 ani am implicat peste 2000 de tineri în proiectele noastre și am pus pe agenda publică și politică problema accesului universal și echitabil la produse menstruale gratuite în școli.

description: この番組では、茶道や華道、日本の建築や思想などを通して、日本文化にまつわる小さな気づきや考え方をお話しします。 まず日本語で、そして同じ内容を英語でもお伝えします。 日本文化を海外の方に伝えたい方、英語で日本の感覚をどう表現すればいいか悩んでいる方、そして、静かに自分と向き合う時間を持ちたい方に、このポッドキャストがそっと寄り添えたら嬉しいです。 In this podcast, I share small reflections on Japanese traditions—such as tea ceremony, flower arrangement, architecture, and philosophy. Each episode is spoken first in Japanese, and then in English. This podcast is for those who wish to share Japanese culture with others, for learners looking for natural ways to express Japanese ideas in English, and for anyone who values quiet moments of reflection.

title: I Malavoglia di Giovanni Verga.
author: AudioBooks
description:
I Malavoglia di Giovanni Verga.  
I Malavoglia è il titolo del romanzo più conosciuto dello scrittore siciliano Giovanni Verga, pubblicato a Milano dall'editore Treves nel 1881. Il romanzo narra la storia di una famiglia di pescatori che vive e lavora ad Aci Trezza, un piccolo paese siciliano nei pressi di Catania. Il romanzo ha un'impostazione corale, e rappresenta personaggi uniti dalla stessa cultura ma divisi dalle loro diverse scelte di vita, soverchiate comunque da un destino ineluttabile. Lo scrittore adotta la tecnica dell'impersonalità, riproducendo alcune caratteristiche del dialetto e adattandosi quanto più possibile al punto di vista dei differenti personaggi, rinunciando così all'abituale mediazione del narratore. L'opera va inserita nel Ciclo dei vinti, insieme a Mastro-don Gesualdo e a La Duchessa de Leyra, opere che affrontano il tema del progresso, visto dal punto di vista degli "sconfitti" di ogni strato sociale. La Duchessa de Leyra rimase solo abbozzato, mentre altri due romanzi previsti nel Ciclo (L'Onorevole Scipioni e L'uomo di lusso) non vennero neppure iniziati.

"La Mandragola - La Clizia - Belfagor" di Niccolò Machiavelli è una raccolta di opere teatrali scritte all'inizio del XVI secolo. L'opera d'apertura, "La Mandragola", è incentrata sulla figura di Callimaco, un giovane di ritorno da Parigi invaghito di Lucrezia, moglie del sempliciotto e ingenuo Messer Nicia. I personaggi si muovono in una rete di intrighi e stratagemmi per realizzare i propri desideri, mettendo a nudo le assurdità e le complessità delle relazioni umane. All'inizio della commedia, viene presentato Callimaco, che confida al servo Siro il tormento del suo amore non corrisposto per Lucrezia, nonostante lei sia sposata con Nicia; egli ritiene che la dabbenaggine di Nicia e il suo forte desiderio di avere figli possano offrirgli l'occasione di conquistare la donna. Mentre valutano possibili stratagemmi, Callimaco e Siro si avvalgono dell'astuzia di Ligurio, il quale elabora un piano basato su una pozione miracolosa capace di rendere fertile Lucrezia: ciò creerà il diversivo perfetto affinché Callimaco possa perseguire il suo obiettivo amoroso. L'incipit introduce così un'esplorazione ironica dell'inganno e del desiderio, sullo sfondo di una società intrisa di intrighi e ambiguità morale. (Questo è un riassunto generato automaticamente.)

title: From Unboxing to Streaming: A Complete Guide to Vizio.com Setup
description: Setting up a new smart TV should be exciting, not frustrating. In this episode, we walk you through everything you need to know about Vizio.com Setup, from opening the box for the first time to enjoying your favorite movies, TV shows, and streaming apps. Many users purchase a Vizio Smart TV expecting a quick and easy setup process, but sometimes unexpected issues can slow things down. Whether you’re connecting your TV to Wi-Fi, signing in to streaming services, pairing a remote, or troubleshooting setup errors, this podcast provides simple and practical guidance that anyone can follow. We begin with the basics, including what comes inside the box and how to properly connect your Vizio TV to power and other devices. You’ll learn how to position your TV, connect HDMI devices such as gaming consoles and streaming sticks, and prepare everything for a smooth installation experience. Next, we dive into the complete Vizio.com Setup process. We’ll explain how to connect your TV to your home internet network, update the system software, and activate important smart features. If you’ve never set up a smart TV before, don’t worry. This episode breaks down every step into easy-to-understand instructions. Streaming is one of the biggest reasons people buy smart TVs today, so we’ll also cover how to access popular streaming platforms, create accounts, and solve common login problems. Whether you’re using Netflix, YouTube, Prime Video, Disney+, or other entertainment apps, you’ll discover tips that help you get started faster. Of course, not every setup goes perfectly. That’s why we also discuss some of the most common problems users encounter during the Vizio.com Setup. From Wi-Fi connection failures and software update errors to remote pairing issues and activation screen problems, we explain simple troubleshooting methods that can save time and reduce frustration. This episode is designed for beginners, families, and anyone who wants a clear, straightforward guide without technical jargon. Our goal is to help listeners feel confident throughout the entire setup process while avoiding common mistakes that can delay installation. By the end of this podcast, you’ll have a better understanding of how to complete your Vizio.com Setup, optimize your TV settings, and enjoy a smooth streaming experience. Whether you’ve just purchased a new Vizio TV or you’re helping a friend or family member get started, this episode serves as a practical resource you can return to whenever needed. Join us as we take you from unboxing to streaming, providing helpful tips, real-world solutions, and easy-to-follow instructions that make smart TV setup simple and stress-free. If you’re ready to get the most from your Vizio Smart TV, this is the episode you won’t want to miss.

title: The Secret of Father Brown: Mysteries of a Devout Detective
author: G. K. Chesterton
description: In 'The Secret of Father Brown,' G. K. Chesterton invites listeners into the intriguing world of Father Brown, a humble priest with a remarkable knack for solving mysteries. This collection features a series of captivating tales where faith, intuition, and clever deduction intersect. As Father Brown navigates through complex crimes, he reveals profound insights about human nature and morality. Each story challenges the reader to think critically about justice and redemption while keeping them on the edge of their seat. With a blend of wit and wisdom, Chesterton crafts narratives that not only entertain but also provoke thought. Discover how this unassuming priest uses his deep understanding of people to uncover hidden truths and bring resolution to perplexing cases. Whether you're a fan of classic detective fiction or new to Father Brown's adventures, this audiobook promises to engage your mind and spark your curiosity.

title: My Life in China and America: The Journey of Yung Wing
author: Yung Wing
description:
At the age of 18, Yung Wing stepped onto American soil, carrying not just his dreams but the weight of two cultures. In "My Life in China and America," he shares his extraordinary journey as the first Chinese graduate of Yale University, illuminating the struggles and triumphs of navigating life between two worlds. This memoir captures the essence of identity, immigration, and the search for belonging during a transformative period in history.

With vivid storytelling, Yung reflects on his childhood in China, where tradition and expectation shaped his early years. As he adapts to life in America, he faces both opportunities and challenges that test his resolve and redefine his sense of self. His experiences reveal the complexities of cultural exchange, shedding light on the often-overlooked perspectives of Asian Americans during the late 19th century.

Listeners will resonate with Yung's passion for education, his unyielding spirit, and his reflections on friendship, racism, and the immigrant experience. "My Life in China and America" is not just a personal narrative; it invites listeners to explore broader themes of resilience and adaptation in a world that continually shifts. Discover the rich tapestry of Yung Wing's life, where each chapter unveils a new layer of understanding about what it means to belong and to bridge cultures.
